title: Analyses
description: The Analyses module provides a comprehensive suite of analytical capabilities including characterization, incidence rate estimation, treatment pathways, population-level estimation, patient-level prediction, and self-controlled case series. Researchers can design, execute, and share study packages, and collaborate through the Community Workbench SDK and Phenotype Library.
tips: Start with a Characterization analysis to understand baseline demographics and clinical features of your cohort before running comparative studies.
Use Treatment Pathways to visualize sequences of treatments within a cohort and identify common clinical practice patterns.
Package your study using Study Packages to ensure reproducibility and facilitate sharing with external collaborators.
Leverage the Phenotype Library to reuse validated cohort definitions and analysis specifications rather than building from scratch.
Use Evidence Synthesis to combine results across multiple data sources and strengthen the generalizability of your findings.
